title: Do you think we will ever see another EVA series
display_title: Do you think we will ever see another EVA series
wikitext:
[]: Do you think we will ever see another EVA series ?             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:52 pm So far we've seen 26 ep's and 2 movies in ten years. From a money standpoint EVA still makes decent bank for ganix, and money always leaves the door open for more anime :P . Anno by all reports is a calmer happier guy then he was in the mid 90's, and is I believe unintrested in doing another series. Lets face it Eva with out Anno would not be eva at all. Do you peeple think we'll ever see a sequle to our favorate animated obession ?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:52 pm No. Don't need one, don't want one, and even GAINAX isn't that money hungry. Never speak of this again.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:57 pm I wouldn't have a problem with a spin-off, or something. Like pre-2nd impact or the alt-universe, or something. Hell I don't care what they do, I'm sure it can't be much more a waste of my time then what I'm doing now.

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Mon Mar 21, 2005 8:51 pm I whant a EVA series where it takes place in another part of the world with diff characters evas angels and ends

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 21, 2005 10:09 pm http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=135711

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Mar 22, 2005 6:53 am i believe anno said that he would like to make another eva series as soon as he gets the ispiration for it. at the moment he said he is really into live action, i wonder what project has his interest? (sarcasm, obviously) personally, i think it would be great if it was a pre second impact OR post third impact as long as it wasn't just a money maker with the soul that the originol had, taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by konnor » Tue Mar 22, 2005 4:25 pm maybe a different universe where Rei is being centered and kaworu wasn't an angel and Shinji seemed to be her teenage crush!!! and the goddam appearance of eva unit 04

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Tue Mar 22, 2005 5:24 pm i would actually hate seeing an alternate universe thing with eva - look at tenchi - the oav was pretty nice, then they changed everything up and it sucked. at least that's how i feel about it. but hey, i could always be completely wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Mar 22, 2005 7:18 pm Reichu wrote: http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=135711

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Mar 22, 2005 8:15 pm The thing about EVA that makes it diffrent is interpersonal conflicts between the darkly human characters. The sequle I'd like to see would involve more of this. its not that I'm im intrested in stringing things along until I get a " happy ending" more that I'm intrested in watching another battle with the 18th angel so to speak.

Article: Do you think we will ever see another EVA series 
[]: Do you think we will ever see another EVA series ?             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:52 pm So far we've seen 26 ep's and 2 movies in ten years. From a money standpoint EVA still makes decent bank for ganix, and money always leaves the door open for more anime :P . Anno by all reports is a calmer happier guy then he was in the mid 90's, and is I believe unintrested in doing another series. Lets face it Eva with out Anno would not be eva at all. Do you peeple think we'll ever see a sequle to our favorate animated obession ?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:52 pm No. Don't need one, don't want one, and even GAINAX isn't that money hungry. Never speak of this again.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:57 pm I wouldn't have a problem with a spin-off, or something. Like pre-2nd impact or the alt-universe, or something. Hell I don't care what they do, I'm sure it can't be much more a waste of my time then what I'm doing now.
